instruction: Three things wrong with the check square icon: the base outline is yellow, the arrow mark is green (wrong color), AND the arrow mark has drifted out of place. Fix everything.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/check-square.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #fde047" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><polyline points="9 11 12 14 22 4"/><path d="M21 12v7a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h11"/></g>
  <polyline id="arrow" fill="none" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="92,100 104,112 100,104 104,112 96,108" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/check-square.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><polyline points="9 11 12 14 22 4"/><path d="M21 12v7a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h11"/></g>
  <polyline id="arrow" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="100,100 112,112 108,104 112,112 104,108" />
</svg>
